decisions.decision: Implement the missing replay-backed `/positions` seam locally in `backend/server.py` on this branch, including both the ordered `EventTrade` replay helper and the route-facing integration, rather than waiting for a separate prerequisite branch.
alternatives_rejected: Only edit the existing serializer and assume the replay helper will arrive from another branch later.
Block this leaf on an external prerequisite instead of backfilling the missing seam here.

decisions.decision: Keep `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE` authoritative for live-row existence, rounded-zero pruning, and lexical `(marketId, outcomeId)` wire ordering, while replay augments only row pricing; if replayed survivor size or sign disagrees with the live row after canonical six-decimal rounding, preserve the live row and downgrade only `unrealizedPnl` to `0.0`.
alternatives_rejected: Rebuild `/positions` directly from replay history instead of live exposure rows.
Trust replayed survivor state over the live exposure projection.
Fail the entire account read when replay and live exposure disagree.

decisions.decision: Replay history should come only from matching filled `EventTrade` rows in `ORDERS`, ordered deterministically by `(filledAt, id)`, and a slice should be treated as having no usable history when no replayable fills remain or when any admitted fill has invalid accumulator inputs such as unsupported `side`, non-finite or non-parsable `size` or `price`, `size <= 0`, or `price` outside `[0.0, 1.0]`.
alternatives_rejected: Mix other order types into replay history.
Replay in insertion order or by timestamp alone without the `id` tie-break.
Skip malformed admitted fills and continue replay from the remainder.

decisions.decision: Reconstruct basis with a signed-position replay accumulator that rounds every fill transition with the existing six-decimal helpers, keeps `averageCost` positive while `netSize` carries direction, and computes row-level mark-to-market as `(mark - averageCost) * netSize` using `query_market_atomic_probability_for_inference(marketId, outcomeId)` for the mark.
alternatives_rejected: Delay rounding until the final serialized scalar.
Encode direction in the sign of `averageCost` instead of signed `netSize`.
Use `lastTradePrice` as the mark instead of inference.

decisions.decision: All replay or mark failures should degrade per row, not per request: preserve the live `{marketId, outcomeId, netSize, lastTradePrice}` row shape, add `unrealizedPnl`, and emit `unrealizedPnl: 0.0` whenever usable history is absent, replay is incompatible with the live row, or the mark lookup fails.
alternatives_rejected: Fail the whole `/positions` response on the first replay or inference problem.
Drop rows whose pricing inputs cannot be reconstructed.

steps.task: Add ordered replay helpers in `backend/server.py` to collect one `(accountId, marketId, outcomeId)` slice of filled `EventTrade` history from `ORDERS`, matching by `targetMarketId` and `targetOutcomeId` when present, falling back to the stored payload literal when needed, and sorting admitted fills by `(filledAt, id)`.

Implement a replay accumulator in `backend/server.py` that consumes the ordered fills and returns deterministic replay outputs such as `historyFound`, replayed `netSize`, and signed-average-cost state, applying the agreed per-fill validation, six-decimal rounding, partial-close preservation, exact-close reset, and sign-flip basis reset rules.

Update the `/positions` serialization path so it still derives liveness and lexical wire order from `ACCOUNT_EXPOSURE`, but augments each surviving live row with `unrealizedPnl` by reconciling the replayed survivor against the live row after canonical rounding and marking compatible rows through `query_market_atomic_probability_for_inference(...)`.

Extend `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` in the existing exposure-projection coverage to pin deterministic `(filledAt, id)` replay order, same-timestamp tie handling, malformed-history downgrade behavior, replay/live mismatch fallback, mark-failure fallback, successful P&L computation, lexical wire ordering, and the existing projection-local `404` behavior when all rows are pruned.
Run the focused `/positions` backend tests that cover the new replay seam and review the resulting diff for contract alignment before moving on to implementation landing work.
